source: Curated from basketball shooting biomechanics literature; thresholds are soft decision aids, not universal injury or technique diagnoses.

policy.diagnostic_use: Use research-backed signals as evidence candidates. Do not convert one metric into a strong diagnosis without linked signals, camera-view sufficiency, and confidence checks.

threshold_types.comparative: Derived from reported group differences or descriptive statistics in a study population.
threshold_types.model_based: Derived from projectile or biomechanical modeling rather than direct coaching diagnosis.
threshold_types.heuristic: Practical system threshold derived from literature direction plus coach/system needs; requires local calibration.
threshold_types.user_baseline: Compare against the same user's historical sessions rather than a population norm.

signals.name: 出手瞬间躯干前倾
signals.diagnostic_use: Candidate signal for low release height, forward drift, or unstable force transfer. Ask for side-view evidence if missing.
false_positive_checks: 急停、后撤步、对抗投篮可能自然产生更大躯干前倾。
个体投篮风格稳定且球路稳定时，不应仅凭前倾角下强诊断。
单摄像头 2D 姿态估计可能把身体旋转误投影成前倾。

research_basis.title: Biomechanical characteristics of proficient free-throw shooters-markerless motion capture analysis
research_basis.population_context: 34 recreationally active males with basketball experience; free throws; 3D markerless motion capture.
research_basis.finding: Proficient shooters had less forward trunk lean at ball release than non-proficient shooters; reported trunk lean was 1.87 +/- 3.28 deg for non-proficient and -1.11 +/- 3.49 deg for proficient, p = 0.016.

research_basis.title: Biomechanics of the Basketball Jump Shot-Six Key Teaching Points
research_basis.population_context: Biomechanics-informed teaching points for mid- to long-range jump shots.
research_basis.finding: Skilled shooting is commonly framed around minimizing horizontal body movement and maintaining near-vertical trunk alignment.

signals.name: 出手高度偏低

soft_thresholds.label: user_decline
soft_thresholds.condition: release_height_ratio decreases from user's rolling baseline

signals.diagnostic_use: Candidate signal for low release, insufficient extension, or excessive forward lean. Use with shot type and distance.
false_positive_checks: 不同身高、臂展、投篮距离、是否有防守都会改变合理出手高度。
熟练罚球者内部命中/未命中差异很小，不能把高出手点绝对化。
过度追求出手高度可能反而破坏节奏。

research_basis.title: Biomechanical characteristics of proficient free-throw shooters-markerless motion capture analysis
research_basis.population_context: Free throws; recreationally active males; release height adjusted by body height.
research_basis.finding: Proficient shooters had greater release height ratio than non-proficient shooters at release (1.17 vs 1.12, p = 0.010), but within proficient shooters made shots had slightly lower release and COM heights than missed shots.

signals.name: 准备阶段下肢屈曲模式

soft_thresholds.label: three_point_reference
soft_thresholds.condition: knee_angle_pp_deg near 94 and hip_angle_pp_deg near 143 for proficient 3-point reference

signals.diagnostic_use: Use to contextualize lower-body loading. Deep knee flexion can be adaptive for 3-point force production; diagnose only when timing or output is poor.
false_positive_checks: 三分球需要更大力量输出，较深的下肢屈曲不应自动判错。
罚球、中距离、三分不能共用同一个膝角阈值。
膝角需要结合脚踝速度、起球时序和出手结果。

research_basis.title: Biomechanical determinants of proficient 3-point shooters: markerless motion capture analysis
research_basis.population_context: Male 3-point shooters; markerless motion capture; proficient defined by shooting percentage.
research_basis.finding: Proficient 3-point shooters displayed greater hip, knee, and ankle flexion during the preparatory phase than non-proficient shooters.

signals.name: 准备阶段肘部高度与屈曲

soft_thresholds.label: compare_user_and_shot_type
soft_thresholds.condition: Use population references only within same shot type; compare trend against user's own baseline

signals.diagnostic_use: Candidate signal for shot-pocket quality, elbow setup, and release mechanics.
false_positive_checks: 不同投篮距离对肘部高度和屈曲要求不同。
肘部位置不能脱离肩、腕、球路和出手角独立诊断。
正面视角更适合看侧向偏移，侧面视角更适合看高度和屈伸。

research_basis.title: Kinetic and Kinematic Characteristics of Proficient and Non-Proficient 2-Point and 3-Point Basketball Shooters
research_basis.population_context: 29 recreationally active college-aged males; 2-point and 3-point shots; 1740 shots; force plate and two HD cameras.
research_basis.finding: For 2-point shots, elbow angle, elbow height, and release angle discriminated proficient from non-proficient shooters; for 3-point shots, hip angle, heel height, and elbow angle were key variables.

research_basis.title: Key Kinematic Components for Optimal Basketball Free Throw Shooting Performance
research_basis.population_context: 17 male basketball players; free throws; 3D motion tracking sensors.
research_basis.finding: Internal knee and elbow angles, elbow height, forearm angle from vertical, and shoulder flexion angle were examined as key variables; forearm angle distinguished made from missed shots within proficient shooters.

signals.name: 前臂相对垂直角度

soft_thresholds.label: near_vertical_reference
soft_thresholds.condition: forearm_angle closer to vertical is generally favorable in free-throw research context

signals.diagnostic_use: Candidate signal for forearm alignment and elbow-wrist direction control.
false_positive_checks: 2D 单视角可能无法区分前臂真实倾斜与身体旋转。
手型、肩部旋转和出手点会影响前臂角解释。
不同球员可能使用稳定但非完全垂直的个性化出手路径。

research_basis.title: Key Kinematic Components for Optimal Basketball Free Throw Shooting Performance
research_basis.population_context: Free throw shooting; male basketball players; 3D motion tracking.
research_basis.finding: Forearm angle from vertical was highlighted as the key variable distinguishing made and missed shots within proficient free-throw shooters.

signals.name: 出手角度场景化参考

soft_thresholds.label: free_throw_model_reference
soft_thresholds.condition: free_throw_release_angle near 52 deg in model context

soft_thresholds.label: jump_shot_distance_effect
soft_thresholds.condition: longer jump-shot distance often lowers release angle and height while increasing release velocity

signals.diagnostic_use: Use release angle as a shot-context feature, not a universal correctness threshold.
false_positive_checks: 罚球理论模型不能直接套用到三分、急停、后仰和对抗跳投。
出手角必须和速度、出手高度、旋转、距离一起解释。
不同投篮风格可通过不同角度-速度组合命中。

research_basis.title: Optimal release conditions for the free throw in men's basketball
research_basis.population_context: Men's free throw projectile model; release angle, speed, spin, aiming point.
research_basis.finding: The model suggests an approximately 52 deg launch angle with up to 3 Hz backspin for men's free throws.

research_basis.title: Increased Distance of Shooting on Basketball Jump Shot
research_basis.population_context: Ten male expert basketball players; jump shots from 2.8, 4.6, and 6.4 m.
research_basis.finding: With increased distance, release height and release angle decreased while release velocity increased.

signals.name: 出手前肘腕协同波动

soft_thresholds.label: late_release_window
soft_thresholds.condition: inspect elbow-wrist coordination variability in final 0.016s before release when frame rate supports it

signals.diagnostic_use: Advanced signal for unstable late correction or inconsistent release coordination.
false_positive_checks: 普通 30fps 手机视频无法稳定观察 0.016s 窗口。
单次投篮不适合判断个体协调波动，需要多次出手比较。
手腕点位估计误差会显著影响该指标。

research_basis.title: Coordination-variability and kinematics of misses versus swishes of basketball free throws
research_basis.population_context: Collegiate basketball players; free throws; missed vs swished attempts.
research_basis.finding: Misses showed increased elbow-wrist angle-angle coordination variability during the last 0.016 s before ball release.

signals.name: 起球-下肢启动时序差

soft_thresholds.label: user_baseline_regression
soft_thresholds.condition: ball_lift_knee_delta_ms worsens versus user's rolling baseline

signals.diagnostic_use: Candidate signal for hand-fast-leg-slow timing. Use only when side-view frame timing is reliable and lower-body loading or release-output signals also support it.
false_positive_checks: 一段式投篮可能自然更早起球，不能单凭时序差下结论。
视频帧率低于 60fps 或球被身体遮挡时，起球时间点误差会放大。
急停、接球投和后撤步需要按 shot_type 分开建基线。

research_basis.title: Biomechanics of the Basketball Jump Shot-Six Key Teaching Points
research_basis.population_context: Biomechanics-informed teaching points for mid- to long-range jump shots.
research_basis.finding: Jump-shot teaching commonly emphasizes coordinated lower-body force transfer and controlled vertical body movement before release.

research_basis.title: Biomechanical determinants of proficient 3-point shooters: markerless motion capture analysis
research_basis.population_context: Male 3-point shooters; markerless motion capture; proficient defined by shooting percentage.
research_basis.finding: Proficient 3-point shooters displayed greater lower-body flexion during the preparatory phase, supporting the need to interpret ball-lift timing together with lower-body loading rather than as a standalone threshold.

signals.name: 投篮距离改变动作参数

soft_thresholds.label: distance_context_required
soft_thresholds.condition: Do not apply a shared angle or release-height threshold across free throw, mid-range, and 3-point shots

signals.diagnostic_use: Context gate for all release and lower-body signals. Normalize or branch rules by shot distance.
false_positive_checks: 远距离投篮释放速度上升、释放角和高度下降可能是任务需求，不一定是技术退步。
短距离、中距离、三分的指标不能直接横向比较。
训练计划应按 shot_type 分开跟踪。

research_basis.title: The relationship between basketball shooting kinematics, distance and playing position
research_basis.population_context: 15 players by position; jump shots from 2.74, 4.57, and 6.40 m; 3D cinematography.
research_basis.finding: Release speed increased with distance; release angles were higher at shorter distances and lower at the longest distance.

research_basis.title: Increased Distance of Shooting on Basketball Jump Shot
research_basis.population_context: Ten male expert players; jump shots from three distances.
research_basis.finding: Shot accuracy, release height, release angle, and release velocity changed as shooting distance increased.
